title: Cleanup skopeo man page and README.md
body:
Fix spelling mistakes
Fix reference to garbage collection on the container registry server.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @runcom I think we need to improve the README to deemphasize atomic registries, but mention other registries like AWS and google registries, perhaps other vendors besides docker.  Aritfactory, OpenShift, Quay.io, others?
We probably need to mention more prominently the use of github.com/containers/image and to a lesser degreee containers/storage.
@runcom @mtrmac fixed, I think this is ready to merge.
I'll cut a new release now
